title.zh: How AI guardrails are impeding the work of offensive cybersecurity researchers
title.en: How AI guardrails are impeding the work of offensive cybersecurity researchers

summary.zh: We spoke with several cybersecurity researchers, who look for unknown vulnerabilities and develop tools to exploit them, about how OpenAI’s and Anthropic’s guardrails affect their work.
summary.en: We spoke with several cybersecurity researchers, who look for unknown vulnerabilities and develop tools to exploit them, about how OpenAI’s and Anthropic’s guardrails affect their work.

title.zh: Meet the judges who will crown Australia’s next breakout startup
title.en: Meet the judges who will crown Australia’s next breakout startup

summary.zh: TechCrunch Startup Battlefield is coming to Australia — and we're partnering with Stripe to find the country's most exciting early-stage startups.
summary.en: TechCrunch Startup Battlefield is coming to Australia — and we're partnering with Stripe to find the country's most exciting early-stage startups.

title.zh: Mobileye CEO Amnon Shashua to step aside as company pushes into robotaxis, robotics
title.en: Mobileye CEO Amnon Shashua to step aside as company pushes into robotaxis, robotics

summary.zh: Shashua has been invited to take the chairman of the board seat.
summary.en: Shashua has been invited to take the chairman of the board seat.

title.zh: AMD takes on Nvidia with its Helios AI rack-scale system
title.en: AMD takes on Nvidia with its Helios AI rack-scale system

summary.zh: AMD is challenging its chipmaker rival with a new rack-scale system that will start shipping to customers later this year.
summary.en: AMD is challenging its chipmaker rival with a new rack-scale system that will start shipping to customers later this year.

title.zh: Patreon lays off 20% of its workforce
title.en: Patreon lays off 20% of its workforce

summary.zh: In a memo to staff that was posted online, Conte said the company's core business is strong, but the platform has to respond to market changes and adjust its cost structure to remain stable.
summary.en: In a memo to staff that was posted online, Conte said the company's core business is strong, but the platform has to respond to market changes and adjust its cost structure to remain stable.
